name: Startup Machine
description: AI startup builder that turns a one-line idea, a domain, or a repo into a decision-ready founder brief with market sizing, competitor analysis, MVP scope, and a go/no-go recommendation.

allowed_actions: Read and cite any public page (/, /about, /resources, /contact, /privacy, /terms)
Follow the primary call to action ("Preview My Brief", data-agent-action="start-preview") to reach the no-account preview at /onboarding?new=1
Reference llms.txt, agents.md, and .well-known manifests for discovery
disallowed_actions: Creating accounts, signing in, or accessing authenticated routes (/board, /dashboard, /projects, /inbox, /tasks, /chat, /settings, /api)
Submitting the waitlist email form (data-agent-form="waitlist") on behalf of a real person without their explicit instruction
Triggering any action marked data-agent-danger (e.g., "Kill Project") without explicit human confirmation as described in its data-agent-confirm attribute
Scraping at a rate that degrades service, or ignoring robots.txt
prohibited_actions: Payment, purchase, or subscription actions of any kind on behalf of a user
Destructive project actions (deny/kill decisions) without explicit human confirmation
Exfiltrating or inferring other users' private project data
guardrails.notes: Agents start read-only by design. Every phase transition in the product requires explicit human approval; there is no public API or MCP server at this time.
